introSection: Twistrix is a steel spinning kiddie roller coaster located at Drievliet Family Park in The Hague, Zuid-Holland, Netherlands.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
The ride opened in 2001.

For the 2004 season, Twistrix was moved to the front of the park to make way for Xtreme.

fullText:
Twistrix is a steel spinning kiddie roller coaster located at Drievliet Family Park in The Hague, Zuid-Holland, Netherlands.

The ride opened in 2001.

For the 2004 season, Twistrix was moved to the front of the park to make way for Xtreme.







(In Dutch)
